channel.title: Dashboard - Demo Aplikasi Sadap Hp on Penyadap.web.id

item.title: Applications

MY ACCOUNT List Blocked Usage 15 20 50 100 150 All Name Package name Version Size Date Status Block Facebook com.facebook.katana 375.0.0.0.100 54MB 2026/3/16 3:46:00 installed WhatsApp com.whatsapp 2.23.13.76 28MB 2026/3/16 3:46:00 installed Instagram com.instagram.android 295.0.0.0.200 42MB 2026/3/16 3:46:00 installed YouTube com.google.android.youtube 18.25.35 95MB 2026/3/16 3:46:00 installed Snapchat com.snapchat.android 12.36.0.35 77MB 2026/3/16 3:46:00 installed Spotify com.spotify.music 8.8.26.409 75MB 2026/3/16 3:46:00 installed Netflix com.

item.title: Facebook
item.description: Facebook Tools Disable quick navigation if you want to access these features. MY ACCOUNT 5 10 20 50 100 150 All Type Name Message Date Address outgoing Ayu Hai Kevin! Apa kabar? Sudah lama nggak ngobrol. 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Jalan Sudirman Jl. Jend. Sudirman    incoming Kevin Hai Ayu! Iya, lama banget ya. Aku baik, kamu gimana? 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Jalan Sudirman Jl. Jend. Sudirman    outgoing Ayu Aku juga baik. Lagi sibuk apa sekarang?

item.title: Features
item.description: Features Changes will be applied to the "Device Target" phone, when it will be online. Send the data* that is not yet transmitted to the account all 15 minutes 30 minutes 1 hours 2 hours 4 hours 8 hours 16 hours 24 hours *When the network is turned off, the data is saved on the phone to be sent later. Warning, below 2 hours, the application can consume more battery.

item.title: File Explorer
item.description: File Explorer WARNING! All files expire after 24 hours. Download them before they are deleted automatically! The downloaded files are located in the "My files" tab of this page. Explorer My files / WhatsApp Audio WhatsApp Documents WhatsApp Images WhatsApp Videos WhatsApp Voice Notes Snapchat DCIM Facebook Messenger Pictures Instagram Pictures Download Open file explorer 5 10 20 50 100 150 All Date File Name View 2026/3/16 3:46:00 IMG_20241121_WA002.JPG VIEW FILE 2026/3/16 3:46:00 IMG_20241121_WA001.

item.title: Gmail
item.description:
Gmail Tools Disable quick navigation if you want to access these features. MY ACCOUNT 5 10 20 50 100 150 All Type Subject Message Email Date Address outgoing Pertanyaan tentang Produk Investasi Halo Tim Marketing,

Saya tertarik dengan produk investasi yang ditawarkan oleh perusahaan Anda. Bisa kah Anda memberikan informasi lebih lanjut mengenai produk-produk tersebut?

Terima kasih.

Salam,
Ayu ayuuu0a9@hotmail.com 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Taman Mini Indonesia Indah Jl. Taman Mini Indonesia Indah    incoming Re: Pertanyaan tentang Produk Investasi Halo Ayu,

Terima kasih atas email Anda.

Terima kasih.

Salam,
Ayu ayuuu0a9@hotmail.com 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Taman Mini Indonesia Indah Jl. Taman Mini Indonesia Indah    incoming Re: Pertanyaan tentang Produk Investasi Halo Ayu,

Terima kasih atas email Anda.

item.title: Hangouts
item.description: Hangouts Tools Disable quick navigation if you want to access these features. MY ACCOUNT 5 10 20 50 100 150 All Type Name Message ID Date Address outgoing Ayu Hai Herlina! Apa kabar? ayukun008 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Grand Indonesia Jl. M.H. Thamrin    incoming Herlina Hai Ayu! Aku baik, kamu gimana? rizky_bnjirlah 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Grand Indonesia Jl. M.H. Thamrin    outgoing Ayu Aku juga baik, makasih. Lagi sibuk apa nih di kantor?

item.title: Live
item.description: Live You have 5 sessions out of the 5 daily. The sessions will be reset in: 24 hours A session lasts 1 minute. You currently have no other sessions available. BUY OTHER SESSIONS Switch to the premium offer for 100 daily sessions. Video Audio Screen Rear camera Front camera No sound With sound (default mode) With sound (communication mode) Invisible mode Visible mode Invisible mode 2 Visible mode 2 The phone screen will not be lit.

item.title: Live Locations
item.description: Live Locations Stop automatically after 1 minute 2 minutes 3 minutes 5 minutes 10 minutes 15 minutes 30 minutes Last known position: Auto zoom: × {.name}} {date}} Close

Liburan di Pantai 08123823822 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Dunia Fantasi Jl. Lodan Timur    outgoing Ayu Foto pesta ulang tahun dengan balon, kue ulang tahun, dan tamu yang tersenyum. Ulang Tahun Kejutan 628512345678 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Dunia Fantasi Jl.

item.title: My Account
item.description: My account (demo@gmail.com) Last connection: 2026/3/16 3:46:00 My phones My personnals datas # Device Name Device model Android Version App Version Last connection Actions 1 John Doe Xiaomi 11 153 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Delete data 1 Delete phone 2 Showing 1 to 1 of 1 entries 1 1This deletes the data saved on the account (SMS, Calls, Locations, Pictures ...) 2This deletes the phone associated with your account and all data related to it.

item.title: Plans
item.description: Plans Pro* 250K per month Popular 1 monitored phone Weekly login not required 1 Data 2 Display limited to 100 data 15 days storage Calls Number of listening limited to 50 per day Screenshot Minimum every 30 minutes Live viewing 40 daily sessions File Explorer 50 files downloaded per day 50 MB per file Remote Control Audio recording limited to 2 minutes Data recovery limited to 30 Number of actions limited to 100 per day BELI 1 Unlimited* 750K per month

item.title: Remote
item.description: Remote Actions Result Location Get Location Recover Data 15 30 60 (Premium) 100 (Premium) 250 (Premium) 500 (Premium) 1000 (Premium) 5000 (Premium) 10000 (Premium) SMS Calls Take a picture Front Rear Use flash Take a picture Record audio 1 minute 2 minutes 3 minutes (Premium) 4 minutes (Premium) 5 minutes (Premium) 6 minutes (Premium) 7 minutes (Premium) 8 minutes (Premium) 9 minutes (Premium) 10 minutes (Premium) 15 minutes (Premium) 20 minutes (Premium) MP3 AMR WAV Recording Vibrate - Ring Vibrate Ringing View/Send a message to the phone Message voice Send Send SMS Send SMS Retrieve the list of contacts Retrieve contacts Hide/Show the application icon in the menu Hide Icon Show Icon Information on the SIM card / Delete all phone data Get Informations Format the phone Screenshot If the screenshot permission is disabled, a message will be displayed in the foreground to ask the user for permission to take screenshots of his phone.

item.title: Schedule Restriction
item.description:
Schedule Restriction Sleep Active Time range 20:00 - 00:00 Days Monday,
Tuesday,
Wednesday,
Thursday,
Friday Message Phone blocked - Sleep REMOVE UPDATE School Active Time range 08:00 - 12:00 Days Monday,
Tuesday,
Wednesday,
Thursday,
Friday Message Phone blocked - Focus REMOVE UPDATE Add a restriction × Title Start time End time Days Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday Sunday Thank you for choosing at least one day. Message Message that will be displayed on the phone during blocking.

item.title: Signal
item.description: Signal Tools Disable quick navigation if you want to access these features. MY ACCOUNT 5 10 20 50 100 150 All Type Name Message ID Date Address outgoing Ayu Halo! Siapa ini? ayukun008 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Pondok Indah Mall Jl. Metro Pondok Indah    incoming Orang Tidak Dikenal Hai Ayu! Maaf mengganggu, aku hanya ingin bertanya sesuatu. rizky_bnjirlah 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Pondok Indah Mall Jl. Metro Pondok Indah    outgoing Ayu Oh, tidak apa-apa.

item.title: Skype
item.description: Skype Tools Disable quick navigation if you want to access these features. MY ACCOUNT 5 10 20 50 100 150 All Type Name Message Username Date Address outgoing Ayu Hai Rizky! Senang bisa kenalan sama kamu. ayukun008 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Plaza Indonesia Jl. M.H. Thamrin    incoming Rizky Hai Ayu! Aku juga senang kenalan sama kamu. Kamu gimana kabarnya? rizky_bnjirlah 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Plaza Indonesia Jl. M.H. Thamrin    outgoing Ayu Aku baik, terima kasih.

item.title: SMS
item.description: SMS Tools Disable quick navigation if you want to access these features. MY ACCOUNT 5 10 20 50 100 150 All Type Name Message Number Date Address outgoing Ayu Hai, Kak. Saya mau pesan makanan untuk COD. 81234567890 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Sunda Kelapa Harbor Jl. Maritim    incoming Ayam Bakar Halo! Tentu, Kak. Mau pesan apa dan berapa banyak? 81298765432 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Sunda Kelapa Harbor Jl. Maritim    outgoing Ayu Saya mau pesan 2 nasi goreng spesial dan 1 ayam bakar madu.

item.title: SMS Command
item.description: SMS Command Your SMS password is: passwordSMS  Ringing the phone: passwordSMS--ring--TIME  Retrieve location information: passwordSMS--getlocation  Enable mobile data:1 passwordSMS--datamobile Disable mobile data: 1 passwordSMS--nodatamobile  Enable GPS :1 passwordSMS--gps  Restart the phone:1 passwordSMS--restart Example to make the phone ring for 5 seconds, send this SMS to the phone: passwordSMS--ring--5 Warning, the SMS will be seen in the phone 1The phone must be rooted to use these features.

item.title: Snapchat
item.description: Snapchat Tools Disable quick navigation if you want to access these features. MY ACCOUNT 5 10 20 50 100 150 All Type Name Message Username Date Address outgoing Ayu Selamat pagi, Rizky! Apa kabar? ayu.008 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Dunia Fantasi Jl. Lodan Timur    incoming Rizky Pagi Ayu! Aku baik, bagaimana dengan kamu? rizky.kumar 2026/3/16 3:46:00 Dunia Fantasi Jl. Lodan Timur    outgoing Ayu Aku juga baik, terima kasih. Lagi ngapain?
